description.html: Gas storage plays a critical role in maintaining a stable and reliable energy system. Besides helping manage supply and demand, it provides critical storage facilities to ensure energy supply during peak periods and when other sources are unavailable. This ensures that energy remains affordable, reliable and secure for years to come, providing a bridge between current infrastructure and the future of cleaner, more efficient energy production.
